debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_1
inst✝² : Fintype d
inst✝¹ : DecidableEq d
𝕜 : Type u_5
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
A B : Matrix d d 𝕜
hA : A.IsHermitian
hB : B.IsHermitian
hAB : Commute A B
j : d
⊢ A.mulVec ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j) =
    @Matrix.SharedEigenbasis.sharedEigenvalueA d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB j •
      WithLp.ofLp ((@Matrix.sharedEigenbasis d inst✝² inst✝¹ 𝕜 inst✝ A B hA hB hAB) j)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  have hSymmA : A.toEuclideanLin.IsSymmetric :=
    isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hA
  have hSymmB : B.toEuclideanLin.IsSymmetric :=
    isHermitian_iff_isSymmetric.mp hB
  have hComm : Commute A.toEuclideanLin B.toEuclideanLin :=
    commute_euclideanLin (A := A) (B := B) hAB
  have hmem :
      (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d) ∈
        eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin
          (show 𝕜 from
            (show 𝕜 from RCLike.ofReal (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB j))) ⊓
        eigenspace B.toEuclideanLin
          (show 𝕜 from
            (show 𝕜 from RCLike.ofReal
              (RCLike.re (dotProduct (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j)
                (B *ᵥ WithLp.ofLp (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j)))))) := by
    simpa [Matrix.sharedEigenbasis, LinearMap.sharedEigenbasis, Submodule.mem_inf] using
      (LinearMap.subordinateOrthonormalBasis_subordinate
        (hA := hSymmA) (hB := hSymmB) (hAB := hComm) j)
  have hmemA :
      (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j : EuclideanSpace 𝕜 d) ∈
        eigenspace A.toEuclideanLin
          (show 𝕜 from (RCLike.ofReal (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB j))) := by
    exact (Submodule.mem_inf.1 hmem).1
  have hE :
      A.toEuclideanLin (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) =
        (RCLike.ofReal (sharedEigenvalueA hA hB hAB j)) •
          (sharedEigenbasis hA hB hAB j) := by
    simpa [LinearMap.mem_eigenspace_iff] using hmemA
  -- translate `toEuclideanLin` statement back to `mulVec`
  simpa [Matrix.toEuclideanLin_apply, sharedEigenvalueA, smul_smul, RCLike.ofReal_re] using hE
